# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 31 — Amount From Schedule 3, Line 15

> Tax year 2025. Re-authored 2026-06-14 to match current program logic.
> Authoritative source: `lines/31.md`.

---

## 1. Outputs

| Output field | Java model | Form 1040 destination |
|---|---|---|
| `Payments.otherPaymentsSchedule3` | `Payments.java` | Line 31 — amount from Schedule 3 line 15 |
| `Schedule3OtherPaymentsCredits.totalOtherPaymentsAndRefundableCredits` | `Schedule3.java` | Schedule 3 line 15 — source for line 31 |
| `Schedule3OtherPaymentsCredits.totalOtherPaymentsRefundableCredits` | `Schedule3.java` | Schedule 3 line 14 — sum(13a..13z) |

Storage convention: line 31 is **null-when-zero** (only written when Schedule 3 line 15 > 0).

---

## 2. Top-Level Formula

```text
Schedule3.line14 = line13a + line13b + line13c + line13d + line13z   (★ G-NEW-1 — 13c now included)
Schedule3.line15 = line9 + line10 + line11 + line12 + line14
Form1040.line31  = Schedule3.line15        (pass-through; null when ≤ 0)
```

Line 31 is the 5th (final) addend of line 32 (= 27a + 28 + 29 + 30 + 31).

---

## 3. Inputs

### 3a. Upstream Schedule 3 Part II computed fields (must exist before line 31 is wired)

| Schedule 3 line | Set by | Source |
|---|---|---|
| line 9 (net PTC) | `applyPremiumTaxCreditToSchedule3()` | Form 8962 line 26 (positive only) |
| line 10 (extension payment) | `applyForm4868ToSchedule3()` | Form 4868 / electronic extension |
| line 11 (excess SS/RRTA) | `computeExcessSocialSecurityTax()` | W-2 box 4 (per-spouse cap $10,918.20 = $176,100 × 6.2%) |
| line 12 (fuel credit) | `applyOtherPaymentsFormToSchedule3()` | Personal form (★ G3 — Form 4136 manual only) |
| line 13a (Form 2439) | `applyForm2439CreditToSchedule3()` | `form-2439` statement entries |
| line 13b (§1341 credit) | `applyOtherPaymentsFormToSchedule3()` | Personal form |
| line 13c (Form 3800 net elective) | `applyOtherPaymentsFormToSchedule3()` | Personal form (★ G5 — Form 3800 OOS; manual only) |
| line 13d (deferred §965) | `applyOtherPaymentsFormToSchedule3()` | Personal form |
| line 13z (other write-in) | `applyOtherPaymentsFormToSchedule3()` | Personal form repeating items |
| line 14 (sum 13a..13z) | `finalizeSchedule3Totals()` | computed |
| line 15 (line 31 source) | `finalizeSchedule3Totals()` | line9 + line10 + line11 + line12 + line14 |

### 3b. Statement inputs

| Statement type | Field | Flows to |
|---|---|---|
| `w-2` | `socialSecurityTaxWithheldAmount` (box 4) | Schedule 3 line 11 (excess SS) |
| `w-2` | `rrtaTier1Withheld` (where applicable) | Schedule 3 line 11 (excess RRTA) |
| `form-2439` | `taxPaidOnUndistributedGains` (box 2) | Schedule 3 line 13a |

### 3c. Personal form inputs — `31-other-payments`

| Field | Schedule 3 line |
|---|---|
| `hasFuelTaxCredit` (gate) + `creditForFederalTaxOnFuels` | 12 |
| `hasSection1341Credit` (gate) + `section1341RepaymentAmount` (informational) + `section1341Credit` | 13b |
| `hasNetElectivePayment` (gate) + `netElectivePaymentElectionAmount` | 13c (★ G5 manual) |
| `hasDeferred965Tax` (gate) + `deferredNet965TaxLiability` | 13d |
| `hasOtherRefundableCredits` (gate) + `otherRefundableCreditItems[].description/amount` | 13z |

---

## 4. Compute Order

```text
applyPremiumTaxCreditToSchedule3()       # → line 9
applyForm4868ToSchedule3()               # → line 10
computeExcessSocialSecurityTax()         # → line 11
applyForm2439CreditToSchedule3()         # → line 13a
applyOtherPaymentsFormToSchedule3()      # → lines 12, 13b, 13c, 13d, 13z
    ↓
finalizeSchedule3Totals()                # → line 14 = sum(13a..13z; ★ 13c included)
                                         # → line 15 = line9+10+11+12+14
    ↓
computeLine31ThroughLine38()             # reads schedule3.line15 → Payments.otherPaymentsSchedule3
   (wiring at TaxReturnComputeService.java:27252-27260)
```

Line 31 has **NO dedicated helper method**. Wiring is inline:

```java
BigDecimal line31 = null;
if (schedule3 != null && schedule3.getOtherPaymentsCredits() != null) {
    BigDecimal line15 = schedule3.getOtherPaymentsCredits().getTotalOtherPaymentsAndRefundableCredits();
    if (line15 != null && line15.compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) > 0) {
        line31 = line15;
    }
}
payments.setOtherPaymentsSchedule3(line31);
```

★ Convention 1 — **if-gate-around-setter** (null-when-zero); zero-cost null path.

---

## 5. MFS Mechanism — M2 Transitive Inheritance

Line 31 has no helper and therefore no direct MFS check at the wiring site. MFS protection is **transitively inherited** via:

- the upstream apply-methods (each with its own M3 or M4 mechanism for SSN/spouse filtering);
- `finalizeSchedule3Totals` (covered by the 20 #5 method-level breadcrumb).

Pattern: M2 (transitive). Line 31 was the first M2 instance in the payments section.

---

## 6. Downstream Consumers

| Consumer | What it reads |
|---|---|
| `Form1040.line32` (`Payments.totalOtherPaymentsAndRefundableCredits`) | adds line 31 as its 5th addend |
| `Form1040.line33` (`Payments.totalPayments`) | line 31 reaches via line 32 |
| Form 1040 PDF — `line31_amount_from_schedule3_line15` | `payments.otherPaymentsSchedule3` |
| Schedule 3 PDF — `sched3_line9..line15` fields | `schedule3.otherPaymentsCredits.*` |
| Frontend `line32OtherPayments()` fallback | reads stored value; falls back to client-side recompute for backward compat |

---

|---|---|
| `line31_amount_from_schedule3_line15` | `payments.otherPaymentsSchedule3` |

| `sched3_line9_net_premium_tax_credit` | `otherPaymentsCredits.netPremiumTaxCredit` |
| `sched3_line10_extension_payment` | `otherPaymentsCredits.amountPaidWithExtension` |
| `sched3_line11_excess_ss_rrta` | `otherPaymentsCredits.excessSocialSecurityRrtaTaxWithheld` |
| `sched3_line12_fuel_credit` | `otherPaymentsCredits.creditForFederalTaxOnFuels` |
| `sched3_line13a_form2439` | `otherPaymentsCredits.form2439` |
| `sched3_line13b_section1341` | `otherPaymentsCredits.section1341Credit` |
| `sched3_line13c_form3800_net_elective` | `otherPaymentsCredits.netElectivePaymentElectionAmount` |
| `sched3_line13d_deferred965` | `otherPaymentsCredits.deferredNet965TaxLiability` |
| `sched3_line13z_other` | `otherPaymentsCredits.otherRefundableCredits` |
| `sched3_line14_total` | `otherPaymentsCredits.totalOtherPaymentsRefundableCredits` |
| `sched3_line15_grand_total` | `otherPaymentsCredits.totalOtherPaymentsAndRefundableCredits` |

---

## 8. Validations / Structural Invariants

| Condition | Action |
|---|---|
| `schedule3` or `schedule3.otherPaymentsCredits` is null | `payments.otherPaymentsSchedule3 = null` |
| `schedule3.line15 ≤ 0` | `payments.otherPaymentsSchedule3 = null` (null-when-zero) |
| `schedule3.line15 > 0` | `payments.otherPaymentsSchedule3 = schedule3.line15` |
| `line 31 ≥ 0` | by construction (sum of non-negative inputs) |
| Schedule 3 Part I credits do NOT feed line 31 | Part I → line 20 (nonrefundable); Part II → line 31 |
| APTC repayment does NOT feed line 31 | routes through Schedule 2 line 1a via Form 8962 Part III |

No blocking flags are emitted at the line 31 wiring site. All validation for Schedule 3 Part II inputs happens upstream in the apply-methods + `finalizeSchedule3Totals`.

---

## 9. Key 2025 Rules

- only Schedule 3 Part II feeds line 31 (Part I → line 20)
- positive `Form 8962 line 26` goes to Schedule 3 line 9 → line 31
- excess APTC repayment goes to Schedule 2 line 1a, NOT line 31
- excess SS / tier 1 RRTA per-spouse cap: $10,918.20 ($176,100 × 6.2%)
- line 12 supported as manual entry via `31-other-payments` (★ G3 — Form 4136 not implemented)
- line 13c supported as manual entry only (★ G5 — Form 3800 OOS; G-NEW-1 closure adds 13c to line 14 sum)
- line 13z is an active write-in line (Form 8689 USVI noted in IRS instructions)
- line 31 inherits MFS protection transitively via M2

---
